name: United Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured regional bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with local branches in Arkansas.
description_long:
United Bank operates as a full-service community bank with FDIC insurance backing, positioning itself with the tagline "Dream Big. Bank Local." The bank maintains a regional presence with locations in Springdale, Rogers, and Fayetteville, Arkansas, and serves both personal and business customers through its website at united-bk.com.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of products across three main categories: deposit accounts (checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRAs), lending products (personal loans, auto loans, home mortgages, home equity loans, business loans, commercial real estate loans, and business lines of credit), and credit cards for both personal and business use. They also provide digital banking services including mobile wallet, Zelle transfers, fraud management tools, and identity theft protection through ID TheftSmart.

United Bank differentiates itself through local community focus and relationship banking, emphasized in their marketing materials about "creating opportunities in our community" and "building relationships." They offer specialty checking accounts through Kasasa (Kasasa Cash, Cash Back, and Tunes checking) that provide cash rewards and earnings credits. Their checking account options are segmented across multiple tiers including UB Fundamental and UB Grand accounts, with separate product lines for business customers.

The bank functions as a traditional brick-and-mortar financial institution with digital-first conveniences. However, the website content provided does not include specific information about interest rates, fees, loan terms, APRs, or competitive positioning versus other regional or national banks, limiting assessment of their value proposition relative to competitors.
services: Personal checking accounts (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Kasasa Tunes, UB Fundamental, UB Grand)
Personal savings accounts (Kasasa Saver, UB Savings, Kids Club, Christmas Club, Money Market Max)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) for personal and business
Personal loans and personal term loans
Home mortgage loans with quote portal
Business checking (UB Business, Small Business, Full Analysis)
Business loans, commercial real estate loans, and business lines of credit
Credit cards for personal and business use
Digital banking including mobile app, online banking, bill pay, Zelle transfers, mobile wallet
Fraud management (Falcon Fraud Manager) and identity theft protection (ID TheftSmart)
Business cash management services including positive pay and remote deposit capture
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, loans, and credit cards under one roof
Kasasa reward checking accounts offering cash rewards and earnings credits
Multiple checking tiers (Fundamental, Grand) and specialty accounts (Kids Club, Christmas Club)
Full-service business banking including commercial real estate loans and business lines of credit
Digital banking tools including mobile app, Zelle, mobile wallet, and fraud manager
Local community banking presence in Arkansas with physical branch locations
Identity theft protection through ID TheftSmart service
cons: Limited geographic footprint (only Arkansas locations mentioned) restricts accessibility for non-regional customers
Website does not display interest rates, APY, fees, or loan terms publicly, requiring customers to contact bank directly
No mention of 24/7 customer service availability or comparison shopping tools
Regional bank may lack some technology features and product variety of larger national banks
Limited information about minimum account balances, eligibility requirements, or account opening process
best_for: Arkansas residents seeking local relationship banking with FDIC protection
Small business owners needing comprehensive business checking and lending services
Customers wanting cash-back rewards from checking accounts through Kasasa products
Individuals seeking one-stop banking for deposit, loan, and credit card needs
diagnosis: United Bank is best for Arkansas residents and small business owners seeking comprehensive banking services from a community-focused FDIC-insured bank with local branches. Primary caveat: the bank's regional limitation and lack of publicly displayed rates/fees require direct contact with the bank before account opening or loan application, and larger national banks may offer more competitive rates or advanced digital features.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
